title: ivesia patellifera
intro: Ivesia patellifera, also known as mountain king or alpine avens, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Ivesia patellifera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and its roots and leaves can be used in various herbal preparations, such as salves and poultices.
